Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jerri]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Jerri is a name used for Jyrine Tessella Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Jerri pulled a dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri is Calder's wife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri has tattoos consisting of lines of script on her ankle, shoulder, and neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri wears emerald earrings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri was the pilot of the ship, responsible for reading maps and stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri is in danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 9''' — Jerri is a character who remembers following her father to a secret meeting as a little girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri is reported to be dead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri kept her own secrets and made her own choices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 13''' — Jerri worked with Calder to gather information for a prison break.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri is a Sleepless and a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri died because of Shera's attack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Calder wonders if they are keeping Jerri alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Jerri begged to accompany Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri is a person whom Bliss considers a probable source of a transmission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Jerri was caught by a second void transmission while sleeping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Jerri has a Soulbound Vessel and earrings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Jerri is a person whose survival Calder hopes for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri is a person questioning Calder about how to open a cell door.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 19''' — Calder plans to work with Jerri to break his father out of prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri's earrings glint green in the moonlight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Jerri is with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri is a prisoner who can feel the influence of the Heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri is an Imperial prisoner wearing a standard red shirt and pants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri has been a Soulbound for virtually her entire life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri's father was a Sleepless leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri's father left the Blackwatch because fellow Guild members were becoming suspicious.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri was raised by the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri was sent to Alsa Grayweather's home to study with the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri's assignment was to help Calder break his father out of prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri pushed for Calder to steal The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri wanted to marry Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Calder found out about Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Jerri is a character who thought someone had returned to Lucan's cell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Jerri calls out to her Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri dives into the waters of Candle Bay.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri climbed onto the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri shouted from above.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Jerri is in prison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Jerri is a prisoner in a cell being attacked by a bone-clawed crab.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Jerri is someone Calder has lost.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Jerri responded that they have taken The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Jerri stated that Kelarac is still free to act.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri was involved in the summoning of an Elder and the destruction of Imperial property.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri is a companion of Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri's father was a member of the Blackwatch who went missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri has spidery tattoos on her hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri is a person on the ship who was urging Calder to explain Nine's actions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Jerri went to get wine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri is a prisoner in the Emperor's quarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri was wearing red prison clothes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri is someone Calder would normally wake up to reassure him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Jerri serves as a pilot on the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri asked if she should kill Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Jerri was unimpressed with the Sleepless acolytes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Jerri is a person who may be in danger due to the Inquisitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri insisted that Calder use the throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Calder forced his way through the crowd back to Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri tried to persuade Calder to sit in the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Calder intends to bring Jerri forward as a guest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri wears a secondhand prisoner's uniform.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri is shackled with enough chains to restrain an Imperial Guard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri possesses a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri can produce green flame from her hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri's goal was to strike a blow against Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri is a member of Calder's crew who is enthusiastic about the upcoming day.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri sealed the stairway door with alchemical resin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri detonated charges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 22''' — Jerri was pushed into the ocean by Shera.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Jerri has tattoos on the left side of her neck and jawline.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Jerri's father was a Watchman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Jerri was brought to the Sleepless by her father when she was a girl.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Jerri is a person Calder's crew members knew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri is a person mentioned by Cheska.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri knelt in the damp basement of a secret meeting-house in the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Jerri was excited about the task and struggled to suppress a grin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Jerri is in prison for betraying Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Jerri was kidnapped by Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Jerri is a crew member on The Testament who is adequate with firearms but hopeless with a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri is a member of the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Jerri's Vessel communicates via her earring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri is a crew member eager to begin the dash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri uses a long knife.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri uses a pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri cradles Calder's head in her lap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri possesses an earring that flickers green.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri can control her Vessel through contact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Jerri is someone Calder remembers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Jerri has a spidery text tattoo on her jawline, neck, and leg.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Jerri is a person Dalton Foster mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri had seen something in the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri has grown used to spending time in cells.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri's maiden name is Tessella.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri's father believed the Great Elders were the path to a better world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri performs an Elderspawn summoning ritual using her own blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Jerri expected Elderspawn to cause chaos so she could escape.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Jerri is a person who receives the Heart of Nakothi from the Great One.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri wore a flawless golden dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri is on a deck with Calder and Elder worms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Jerri rose from the Aion Sea with a blindfold of steel over her eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac is inhabiting Jerri's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Kelarac is in the body of Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Jerri may have been holding back during the battle.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
